text:
Once upon a time in a small woodland town there lived a curious girl named Laurel. She loved animals. Every Saturday she would visit Mr. Tibbles. Mr. Tibbles loved lettuce.

One day Laurel peeked through the birches. What did she see? Oh my stars! There sat a big grey owl staring right at her.

Do you know owls?

That was hard to believe. Then Laurel spoke softly.

"You don’t talk?"

"Just whistle."

Oh wow. Laurel whistled. The owl didn’t whistle back. It sighed instead.

Weeks went by. Laurel visited.

That evening she whistled.

What a nice song!

The owl hooted.

That’s my song.




Those were her favorites.

Now she’d visit lots more times.

That's my owl!













That was all she ever said—

You like owls.




Oh dear. Laurel felt silly.

She didn’t whistle.





Maybe you'll whistle someday.

Just an owl dream.<|endoftext|><|pad|>
